name: full-stack-developer
description: Opinionated full-stack development plugin. Enforces Next.js, NestJS, Turborepo, Expo, Mastra, Prisma, and Clerk with sub-agents for build validation, stack compliance, and completeness checking.

plugins.name: full-stack-developer
plugins.description: Opinionated full-stack development assistant with skills for stack selection, tech rules enforcement, and sub-agents for build and compliance checking.
